name: large-salad
input: a large mixed greens salad with grilled chicken breast, cucumber, tomato, and two tablespoons of ranch dressing
notes: USDA FoodData Central composite: 150g grilled boneless chicken breast (~250 kcal, P 44g), 100g mixed greens + cucumber + tomato (~25 kcal, Fi 4g), 30ml ranch dressing (~145 kcal, F 15g). Justification for critical-tier promotion: high-prevalence Western lunch staple with stable macros across regional variants.
